title: Escape The Backrooms | Entities
description: A mod that adds 13 more entities from the original Escape the Backrooms game.
body:
Enter the world of Escape The Backrooms in Minecraft.
# What this mod add?
This mod adds terrifying creatures, ambient horror, animated entities and iconic monsters inspired by the original Escape The Backrooms game.

Survive encounters with Smilers, Skin Snatchers, Partygoers and other entities while exploring dark environments filled with tension and danger.

# What is there?
## # Features:
• 13 unique entities
• Custom animations
• Horror atmosphere
## # • Blocks and decorative items
• Multiplayer support
• Inspired by Escape The Backrooms
